message:
test(pipeline): add comprehensive executor and loop tests with mock detector

executor_test.go (~930 insertions):
- mockDetector implementing AgentDetector interface for isolated testing
- waitForIdle: context cancellation, immediate ready, timeout behavior
- detectAgentState: maps pane output patterns (generating, error, waiting)
  to correct robot.AgentState values
- Resume: reconstructs executor state from persisted JSON
- calculateRetryDelay: exponential backoff with jitter capping at max
- persistState/loadState: JSON round-trip for RunState
- Run: condition evaluation (true/false/skip), output variable capture,
  while-loop execution, context cancellation mid-run, times-loop iteration
- shouldRerunStep: rerun logic based on step output patterns
- clearStepVariables: removes step-scoped vars from context
- truncatePrompt: edge cases (empty, shorter than limit, exact limit)
- Cancel: sets cancelled flag and verifies GetState reflects it
- emitProgress/calculateProgress: progress percentage computation
- MinProgressInterval: enforces minimum interval between progress emissions
- GenerateRunID: format and uniqueness validation
- resolvePrompt: template variable substitution
- normalizeAgentType: cc/cod/gmi alias resolution

loops_test.go (~170 insertions):
- storeCollected: accumulates collected values in run context
- ExecuteWhile: dry run with maxIterations=0
- ExecuteLoop: for-each over items, times-loop with collect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
